texto: Sometimes I wonder, how different life would have been if everything was based upon perception. No struggle to find the truth, just a believe build upon what we see. Sun could be a ball, Earth would have been flat and I would have eaten Sun using my ice candy as a chopstick.
explicacao: Citação de Swati Verma sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Sometimes I wonder, how different life would have been if everything was based upon perception. N…” articula reflexao, perception, struggle em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como struggle.
